授業の概要・背景: Each week, we will examine a business topic, for example, property, or banking. We will discuss this topic and read about it (both speaking and reading). Then we will have a brief (20 minutes) TOEIC test that reviews the topic discussed.

第1回: Students will be given a reading pack that incorporates the topics with a TOEIC Reading Section 7 style. They must complete this pack and hand it in at the end of the semester.
